steps.title: Account for both artists
steps.content: The passage says a gender-focused interpretation explains Delgado's presence but leaves Herrera unexplained. It then offers a broader context: Chicano artists who did not work as sociohistorical muralists struggled for recognition because the art establishment expected Chicano art to fit muralist traditions.

steps.title: Choose the broader critique
steps.content: Choice A splits the two artists into different meanings, Choice B returns to female artists as the main subject, and Choice D wrongly says the work criticizes sociohistorical muralists themselves. The better conclusion treats the work as about aesthetic constraints on Chicano artists generally. The answer is C.
